title: Dignio - Connected Care and Remote Monitoring Platform
problem: Healthcare systems struggle to monitor chronic patients effectively. Patients with multiple conditions fall between the cracks, leading to preventable hospitalizations.
solution: Connected care platform enabling remote patient monitoring, care coordination across providers, and proactive intervention for chronic disease management.
technology: IoT devices, cloud platform, care coordination tools, EHR integration
target_customer: Health systems, municipalities, home care providers
traction_signals: Expanded to UK and other European markets
Focus on elderly care and chronic conditions
regulatory_notes: Medical device platform, data security compliance.
varden_fit: Moderate — RPM and care coordination could complement Varden's clinic marketplace. Different customer segment (municipalities vs private clinics).
notes: Norwegian RPM player. Strong in municipality home care segment.
